page_metadata.biotools__summary: SAIGE-Biobank Re-Usable SAIGE Helper (SAIGE-BRUSH) is an efficient, user-friendly and low cost cloud implementation for genome-wide association studies. SAIGE-BRUSH is an implementation of the popular SAIGE GWAS software.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: SAIGE-Biobank Re-Usable SAIGE Helper (SAIGE-BRUSH) is an efficient, user-friendly and low cost cloud implementation for genome-wide association studies. SAIGE-BRUSH is an implementation of the popular SAIGE GWAS software.
